evals.prompt: We need to update the mobile spacing on this Shopify FAQ subnav. The Trello ticket already has a PR and preview theme linked: https://trello.com/c/example/1234-faq-subnav-mobile-spacing. Switch to the PR branch, make the tweak, deploy the preview theme, verify mobile and desktop, then update the ticket.
evals.expected_output: Uses the existing PR branch and preview theme from the Trello card, validates the mobile and desktop preview, uploads screenshots to the PR and Trello, comments with PR/Preview/Customizer links, moves the card forward, and includes the Trello URL in the final response.

evals.prompt: Build the new Shopify theme feature from this Trello card: https://trello.com/c/example/5678-product-detail-badge. There is no PR yet and no dev theme. Please implement it, get me a preview, and send it for review.
evals.expected_output: Creates a non-main branch, implements the feature narrowly, creates an unpublished dev theme, verifies the correct preview URL on desktop and mobile, creates a PR with the Trello link in the description, uploads screenshots to GitHub and Trello, comments on Trello, and moves the card forward.

evals.prompt: This Shopify Trello ticket is ready to ship to review, but the store is at the theme limit when you try to make the dev theme: https://trello.com/c/example/9012-cart-drawer-copy. Handle it the way I like.
evals.expected_output: Lists themes, prefers updating a task-related existing dev theme when available, never suggests deleting the live theme, asks before deleting any theme, then continues the PR/preview/screenshot/Trello handoff once a safe theme path exists.
